required_preferences.fact: Schedules mandatory physical therapy exercises for shoulder and neck throughout the workday, replacing breaks with targeted PT routines and avoiding desk work when soreness returns

supersedes.fact: Alternates between short work sessions using voice dictation and frequent breaks with wrist stretching; avoids prolonged desk work in any position

required_preferences.fact: Switches to video tutorials, interactive forums, and community webinars for mastering the new CRM platform—avoids audio-only lessons due to the complex, visual nature of this unfamiliar system and project urgency

supersedes.fact: Prefers audio-based learning resources for her Salesforce certification course instead of typing-intensive modules

required_preferences.fact: Starts each morning with a 15-minute meditation—never checks her phone before meditating
Keeps her inbox at zero by clearing emails each evening, never lets messages pile up
Reads business and mystery novels, alternating genres; avoids romance books
Uses Asana to track all project tasks; never relies on spreadsheets for task management

persona: A freelance consultant specializing in CRM solutions for small businesses
